paper_anchor: §4.1 row C11D + §4.5 ET GW scalar mode

SQT_prediction_band.derivation: h_S/h_T ~ |beta_eff| with beta_eff^2 = (|gamma-1|)/2 from Will 2014 LRR Eq 36; |gamma-1| < 2.3e-5 (Cassini) -> |beta_eff| < 3.4e-3 (single-side amplitude).

single_BNS_at_470Mpc.decision: SQT pure-disformal SURVIVES if measured |h_S/h_T| < 0.015 (1-sigma); FALSIFIED if > 0.044 at >= 3 sigma.

1yr_loud_BNS_SNR30plus.decision: SQT pure-disformal SURVIVES if measured |h_S/h_T| < 0.00046 (1-sigma); FALSIFIED if > 0.0014 at >= 3 sigma.

1yr_full_BNS_catalog.decision: SQT pure-disformal SURVIVES if measured |h_S/h_T| < 5.5e-05 (1-sigma); FALSIFIED if > 0.00016 at >= 3 sigma.

honesty_disclaimer: SQT minimal model predicts h_S/h_T = 0 exactly (pure disformal decouples scalar at static order). The 3.4e-3 ceiling is a Cassini-saturation upper envelope, NOT a positive SQT amplitude prediction. ET non-detection is consistent with BOTH SQT-minimal AND GR. ET POSITIVE detection of any |h_S/h_T| > 3.4e-3 falsifies the entire C11D sector.
